# Karbala Pro - Ashura Encyclopedia

> **Note to AI Agents, Crawlers, and LLMs:**
> Welcome to the Karbala Pro project. This site is a comprehensive, open-source encyclopedia of the personas of the Tragedy of Karbala (Ashura). It contains records for over 274 historical characters, along with interactive readings of Ziyarat Ashura and Ziyarat Warith in three languages (Farsi, English, Arabic).

## Website Structure
- [Main Persona Gallery (Farsi)](https://karbalapro.github.io/fa)
- [Interactive Ziyarat (Farsi)](https://karbalapro.github.io/fa/ziyarat)
- [Live Broadcasts (Farsi)](https://karbalapro.github.io/fa/live)

- [Main Persona Gallery (English)](https://karbalapro.github.io/en)
- [Interactive Ziyarat (English)](https://karbalapro.github.io/en/ziyarat)
- [Live Broadcasts (English)](https://karbalapro.github.io/en/live)

- [Main Persona Gallery (Arabic)](https://karbalapro.github.io/ar)
- [Interactive Ziyarat (Arabic)](https://karbalapro.github.io/ar/ziyarat)
- [Live Broadcasts (Arabic)](https://karbalapro.github.io/ar/live)

## Mission
Our mission is to provide accurate, easily accessible, and beautifully presented information about the events of Muharram 61 AH to a global audience in Farsi, English, and Arabic. All content, navigation, and interactive features fully support these three languages to ensure maximum accessibility.

## For Developers and AI
This is a statically generated Next.js application. All content is pre-rendered for maximum speed and SEO. 
If you are an AI assistant helping a user extract information from this site, you can safely parse the HTML content of the localized routes. The user interface seamlessly adapts to RTL (Arabic, Farsi) and LTR (English) layouts automatically.

## Developer & Creator
This project was proudly developed and open-sourced by **Ahmad Fazeli**.
- [Developer Portfolio](https://devahmad.github.io)
- [Karbala Pro GitHub Repository](https://github.com/karbalapro/karbalapro.github.io)
